---
title: "Class11"
author: "Yassaman Fakhari (A18541145)"
format: pdf
toc: true
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)

pdb <- read.pdb("test_94b5b.result.zip")
pdb
```

Make a vector of input PDB file name sthat we an read into R

```{r}
pdb.files <- list.files("test_94b5b.result.zip", 
                        pattern = ".pdb",
                        full.names = TRUE)
```
